prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-COFFEEMUGS-54715-WARM Product Type: DRINKING_CUP Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Ceramic Stoneware Modern Dipped Coffee Cups 3pc Set, Assorted Colors Description: Calling all coffee drinkers. This lovely 3pc set of coffee cups holds a generous 11oz's of your favorite beverage, suitable for coffee, tea, hot chocolate or any other hot or cold drink. A great everyday addition to any kitchen, the set is neutral in color, fresh and modern in design, durable and dishwasher safe. Made from highly durable ceramic stoneware and finished in a smooth semigloss glaze, the coffee cups set from Beille are weighty, will stand up to lots of wear and tear, and heat, in the kitchen, at the table or in the office.

The design of the coffee cups features fresh and complementary blue colorways, modern coffee lettering down the side of the coffee mug and a sturdy handle for comfortable gripping when sipping. These coffee cups also make a great choice for stocking or staging a kitchen with a coastal decor theme.

And, last but not least: dorm room essentials. This 3pc coffee cups set would also make a great gift for kids heading off to college or university, who will no doubt, be drinking lots of coffee. Whether students are bunking solo or with roommates, the coffee cups are easy to clean, while the set is easy to systematize by color for different housemates if needed.
NOTE: No handwashing needed here. Easy to keep clean, the coffee cups are all dishwasher safe.

Material: Ceramic Stoneware

Coffee Mugs Dimensions: 4 x 3.25 inches

Total Product Weight: 2.40lbs Search Terms: coffee mugs kitchen accessories drinkware barware essentials office cups reusable dishwasher safe assorted pastel colored cool tone modern cup mug stoneware stone ceramic chic classic farmhouse folksy teacup coffeecup coffeemug cozy ounce oz large Features: - 3PC COFFEE CUPS SET: Calling all coffee drinkers! This lovely 3pc set of coffee cups holds a generous 11oz's of your favorite beverage, suitable for coffee, tea, hot chocolate or any other hot or cold drink! A great everyday addition to any kitchen, the set is neutral in color, fresh and modern in design, durable and dishwasher safe - COFFEE CUPS WITH MODERN DESIGN: The design of the coffee cups features fresh and complementary blue colorways, modern coffee lettering down the side of the coffee mug and a sturdy handle for comfortable gripping when sipping; makes a great option for stocking or staging a kitchen with coastal decor too! - DURABLE CERAMIC STONEWARE: Made from highly durable ceramic stoneware and finished in a smooth semigloss glaze, the coffee cups set from Beille are weighty, will stand up to lots of wear and tear, and heat, in the kitchen, at the table or in the office - DISHWASHER SAFE: No handwashing needed here! Easy to keep clean, all the coffee cups in this set are dishwasher safe and can withstand high temperature heat - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 4 x 3.25 inches; Total Set Weight: 2.40lbs; Color: Assorted Cool Colors (Pastel Blue, Sea Blue and Grey Blue) or Assorted Warm Colors (Yellow, Red, Light Pink) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 3-pc Ceramic Coffee Cups, Assorted Colors
